query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "fastcontext: training efficient repository explorer for coding agents" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly measures the same core mechanism (repository exploration capabilities of coding agents) and evaluates the same dependent variables (context retrieval, code localization, and ranking efficiency) that the user's referenced work ("FastContext") addresses, providing the necessary empirical baseline and domain-specific evaluation framework for a literature review on this topic.
